description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers when a pull request is closed. If the pull request was merged and its head and base repositories match and its head ref starts with 'bump-version', then in an ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, install the Rust stable toolchain, extract the package version from Cargo.toml using cargo pkgid, and create a Git tag with a name like 'v<version>' and push it to the origin.
